# Generated by `deno task gaps:audit:update` — do NOT hand-edit.
#
# Every line is a KNOWN BUG: a site shape where injecting a comment makes the
# formatter drop or double-print one. The gate fails on a line that is NOT here
# (a new kind of drop) and on a line here that no longer fires (a stale entry —
# delete it when you fix one). Counts are deliberately not pinned: they churn with
# every ordinary fixture PR, and a gate that fails per added fixture gets turned
# off. The PAYLOAD set is pinned, though: a shape that starts dropping a comment
# kind it used to survive is a new bug on a new ownership path.
#
# A PANIC is never listed here — that invariant is absolute, so it always fails
# the gate rather than being pinned.
#
# Format: KIND<TAB>SHAPE<TAB>PAYLOADS
DROPPED	!)⟨⟩!.	annotation,block,jsdoc_cast
DROPPED	!==⟨⟩␣	multiline
DROPPED	!⟨⟩(	jsdoc_cast

DOUBLE-PRINTED	;;;⟨⟩␣	multiline
DOUBLE-PRINTED	;;⟨⟩IDENT	line

DOUBLE-PRINTED	=>⟨⟩␣	annotation,block,jsdoc_cast,multiline
DOUBLE-PRINTED	=⟨⟩␣	annotation,block,jsdoc_cast,multiline
DOUBLE-PRINTED	>{⟨⟩IDENT	line

DOUBLE-PRINTED	?⟨⟩,	annotation,block,jsdoc_cast,line,multiline
DOUBLE-PRINTED	?⟨⟩]	annotation,block,jsdoc_cast,line,multiline
DOUBLE-PRINTED	@⟨⟩IDENT	line

DOUBLE-PRINTED	IDENT⟨⟩).	annotation,block,jsdoc_cast,line,multiline
